title: skills.rs: load_skills is not cached across turns
description:
Current state: 

Desired state: 

Reason: 

Dimension: Performance. Location: src/skills.rs:59-120 called by src/prompt.rs:174. Every prompt assembly walks the skills dirs and parses YAML. parse_skill_file silently returns None on YAML error. Refactor: cache with mtime invalidation; log parse errors.
